ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A)

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-09-2006 IN 206,PLAINTIFFS RUSSELL & ANNA WIKANDER'S MTN FOR PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL WAS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 8/7/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 7/28/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONDITIONAL UPON MRS. WIKANDER'S DEPOSITION STARTING ON 5/26/06 AND COMPLETED BY 5/31/06. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT APPLIES. MSJ UP TO TRIAL DATE AND FEATURES OF GO 140 WAS STIPULATED TO. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 6/9/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. AN ECONOMIC REPORT AND/OR OFFER OF THEIR EXPERT ECONOMIST FOR DEPOSITION WILL BE SERVED BY FAX NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. WRITTEN ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: VERA MU/LESPY; REPORTER: ARLENE RITA HOWELL CSR #2542 (206)

REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON FEB-14-2007. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 206 ON AUG-07-2006 AT 11:15 AM FOR TRIAL. ASSIGNED FOR MANDATORY SETTLEMENT IN DEPT. 304 ON JUL-28-2006 AT 9:30 AM. ALL EXPEDITED SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTIONS WILL BE HEARD AT THAT TIME IN DEPT. 608.
